summary_ja: バックログ5件処理。AI/LLM関連2件（AINews Kimi K2.5ダイジェスト、SemiAnalysis GPU TCO分析）はreference。Ed ZitronのAIバブル論は5/28処理済みの重複。Dan Larkのstd::sort最適化とBen Boyterの中国旅行記はAI無関係でskip。

decisions.title: [AINews] Moonshot Kimi K2.5 - Beats Sonnet 4.5 at half the cost, SOTA Open Model, first Native Image+Video, 100 parallel Agent Swarm manager
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ AINewsダイジェスト。Kimi K2.5/MoonViT/Agent Swarm/Trinity Largeなどの情報を含むが、Kimi関連は既にentities/kimi.mdで十分にカバー済み（K2.6まで記載）。Trinity Large (400B MoE, Arcee/Prime Intellect) は新規情報だが、ダイジェストの一部として単体でページ化するほどではない。
decisions.body_excerpt: Kimi has been on an absolute tear in the past year, and we last heard from them in November with Kimi K2 Thinking. Like K2, today's K2.5 is still a 32B active-1T param model (384 experts), built through continual pretraining on 15 trillion mixed visual and text tokens atop Kimi-K2-Base...

decisions.title: How Much Do GPU Clusters Really Cost?
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ SemiAnalysisのGPUクラスターTCO分析フレームワーク。ClusterMAX評価、Goodput計算機、GPU/ストレージ/ネットワーク/サポート/デバッグのコスト分解を含む。AIインフラ関連だが、ニュースレターパイプラインで既にSemiAnalysis記事を処理済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Modern GPUs are unbelievably expensive. A single Blackwell GPU costs more than the average car, and uses more energy than a single family home. It is now common for unicorn startups to have thousands of these GPUs working for them, day and night...

decisions.title: AI Is Too Expensive
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ Ed ZitronのAIバブル論。MicrosoftのOpenAIへの$100B支出、ハイパースケーラーのAI capex分析。5/28バックログ処理で既に判定済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: AI is, as it stands, not economically viable for anybody involved other than the construction firms, NVIDIA, and the surrounding hardware companies benefiting from the irrational exuberance of a data center buildout that doesn't appear to be happening at the speed we believed...

decisions.title: Changing std::sort at Google's Scale and Beyond
decisions.reason_ja: ☆☆☆☆☆ C++ std::sortのGoogleスケールでの最適化に関する純粋なシステムプログラミング記事。AI/LLM/エージェントの文脈なし。
decisions.body_excerpt: TL;DR; We are changing std::sort in LLVM's libcxx. That's a long story of what it took us to get there and all possible consequences, bugs you might encounter with examples from open source...

decisions.title: China Trip 3
decisions.reason_ja: ☆☆☆☆☆ 2005年の中国旅行記。AI/LLM/テクノロジーの文脈なし。個人的な旅行メモ。
decisions.body_excerpt: Well I figured I may as well add an end of the story, I believe that anyone who reads this deserves and end to the story and hence I am writing this for you all...
